case_title: CARLOS RUIZ ESPARZA VS. FRANCES AQUINO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-11-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-11-2011 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: LARRY BECKER. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-11-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ESPARZA, CARLOS RUIZ RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AQUINO, FRANCES $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $185.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $685.00, BOTH PARTIES TO RETAIN ALL MONIES OF THE OTHER PARTY AS OF THE DATE OF THIS JUDGMENT. SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-15-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:08am
Judge Pro Tem Joseph Jedekin, clerk- Julie Rumsey, nothing on record, dept 525. Caused called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Frances Aquino appears Pro Per. Respondent Carlos Ruiz Esparza appears Pro Per. Parties previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Jedekin.

Matter is submitted.

9:19am

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-14-2011 Continued To Feb-15-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
